Chroxy
Starting...
  • ● Starting server...
  • ● Waiting for health check...
  • ● Almost ready...
Scan with Chroxy app to pair your phone

Server failed to start

The server didn't respond within 30 seconds.

Try starting manually: npx chroxy start

Check the tray menu for error details.

Requires Node 22 — node@22

Tunnel failed to establish

The Cloudflare tunnel didn't become available within 45 seconds.

Ensure cloudflared is installed: brew install cloudflared

Or switch to Local Only mode in the tray menu.
